message.content:
Look, I've been watching this climate change nonsense for decades, and it's all a big fat hoax cooked up by power-hungry politicians and greedy scientists chasing grants. They tell you the planet's boiling, ice caps are melting, seas are rising—pure fiction! I've seen the data myself: satellite records show no warming trend since the '90s, and those temperature graphs? Cherry-picked to scare you. It's the sun's cycles, natural variation, nothing more.

And don't get me started on these environmental regulations—they're a scam to control us, plain and simple. Cap-and-trade? Just a tax grab that jacks up energy prices while China and India build coal plants like crazy. Electric cars? Laughable—mining the batteries destroys more land than any oil spill. Farmers strangled by rules on fertilizer, factories shut down, jobs shipped overseas. It's not about saving the Earth; it's about elites flying private jets to conferences while telling you to eat bugs and freeze in the dark.

It makes my blood boil. I've worked hard my whole life, built a life on real facts, not this fearmongering cult. They want to shame us into submission, but I'm not buying it. Wake up before it's too late—the real threat is the tyrants pulling these strings.
